title: POST-H-012-B — Approval binding fuerte
commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_012_b_manifest.json --json
pass_criteria: Approval only authorizes exact actor/role/tool/action/subject scope.
tool_call_id mismatch blocks when required by SensitiveActionCatalog.
block_criteria: Generic approval can authorize a critical action.
Expiration is optional for critical actions.
Missing command_id/tool_call_id authorizes an action that requires binding.
risks: Binding is implemented-initial and not yet full PolicyEngine homogeneous enforcement for all surfaces.
RBAC exposure report and quality-gate approval-rbac-hardening remain planned for later micro-sprints.
summary: POST-H-012-B adds strong local approval binding for exact actor/role/tool/action/subject/command/tool_call scope without enabling sensitive execution.
